## Cameroon
## About
Amadagana & Partners (A&P)is a modern and innovative business law firm based in Yaoundé, Cameroon, founded by Lynda Amadagana, an attorney at the Paris and Cameroon Bars.
The firm has a recognised expertise in OHADA business law and in the energy, mining, infrastructure and finance sectors. A&P advises international institutions and corporations, investment funds, private and public companies in the structuring and management of their projects in Cameroon and Africa, with a particular focus on the OHADA zone.
A&P has its main office in Yaoundé, Cameroon, and another office in Paris, France.
A&P is a truly international firm which stands out for the quality and excellence of its services and has a strong reputation in the energy, mining, infrastructure and financing sectors. The firm advice and assistance are based on an in-depth knowledge of the legal, regulatory and business environments in Africa, with a full understanding of its clients’ business objectives.
A&P is a fast-growing law firm, devoted to the African continent which aims at supporting projects with a high impact on African economies. The firm is really innovative in its flexible hierarchical structure which provides greater efficiency and responsiveness. The cohesion of its staff and the prevailing team spirit is a true competitive edge.
A&P also has a strong commitment towards social responsibility and implements best practices to promote diversity within the firm.
With its lawyers experienced in handling high level and complex transactions, A&P is the relevant choice for national and international investors looking for a trustworthy and skilled partner for their projects in Cameroon.
### Languages
* English
* French

* Paris Bar
* Bobigny Bar
* Nigerian Bar
### Staffing Figures
* 2 Partners
* 10 Associates

* 3 General Services
Content supplied by Amadagana & Partners

founders.name: Lynda Amadagana
founders.bio: Founder of Amadagana & Partners, attorney at the Paris and Cameroon Bars.

tavily.answer:
Amadagana & Partners is a Cameroonian law firm founded by Lynda Amadagana, specializing in OHADA business law and operating in Yaoundé and Paris. The firm focuses on energy, mining, infrastructure, and finance sectors. The official website is not directly listed but can be found via legal directories.
Amadagana & Partners is a law firm based in Paris and Yaoundé, specializing in OHADA Law, Energy, Mining, and Financing. Lynda Amadagana founded it, and it focuses on advising clients in Cameroon and Africa. The firm is recognized in the Legal 500 “Legal Landscape” for Cameroon.
Amadagana & Partners is a Cameroonian law firm specializing in business law, energy, mining, and infrastructure sectors. Lynda Amadagana is the managing partner. The firm has offices in Yaoundé and Paris.
Amadagana & Partners is a modern Cameroonian law firm with expertise in energy, mining, and business law. Founded by Lynda Amadagana, it has offices in Yaoundé and Paris. The firm provides legal advice to clients in Africa and beyond.
Amadagana & Partners is a Cameroonian law firm specializing in OHADA business law and sectors like energy, mining, and infrastructure. It has offices in Yaoundé and Paris. Lynda Amadagana founded the firm.
